title: arachniodes chinensis var. cornopteris
intro: Arachniodes chinensis var. cornopteris, also known as the Chinese lady fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to clear heat and relieve toxicity, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Arachniodes chinensis var. cornopteris include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
